# misp_galaxy_cluster (Data Source)

Look up a MISP galaxy cluster by id. Works for both custom and bundled clusters (read-only).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a galaxy cluster by its numeric id.
# Works for both custom and bundled clusters (read-only access).

data "misp_galaxy_cluster" "example" {
  id = "1"
}

output "cluster_tag_name" {
  value = data.misp_galaxy_cluster.example.tag_name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Numeric galaxy cluster id.

### Read-Only

- `authors` (List of String)
- `collection_uuid` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `distribution` (String)
- `elements` (Attributes List) Key-value metadata for this cluster. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--elements))
- `extends_uuid` (String)
- `extends_version` (String)
- `galaxy_id` (String)
- `locked` (Boolean)
- `org_id` (String)
- `orgc_id` (String)
- `published` (Boolean)
- `sharing_group_id` (String)
- `source` (String)
- `tag_name` (String)
- `type` (String)
- `uuid` (String)
- `value` (String)
- `version` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--elements"></a>
### Nested Schema for `elements`

Read-Only:

- `key` (String)
- `value` (String)
